template.name: ODE_Model

location.label: R2' == boundedRateR2() && R0' == boundedRateR0() && R1' == boundedRateR1() && R3' == boundedRateR3() && R4' == boundedRateR4() && R5' == boundedRateR5() && R6' == boundedRateR6() && R7' == boundedRateR7() && R8' == boundedRateR8() && R9' == boundedRateR9() && R10' == boundedRateR10() && R11' == boundedRateR11()

transition.label: R2 = R2Init, R0 = R0Init, R1 = R1Init, R3 = R3Init, R4 = R4Init, R5 = R5Init, R6 = R6Init, R7 = R7Init, R8 = R8Init, R9 = R9Init, R10 = R10Init, R11 = R11Init
